nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2043; const int b = 2112; const int c = 2131; const int d = 2145; const int e = 2158; const int f = 2169; const int g = 2179; const int h = 2189; const int i = 2200; const int j = 2211; const int k = 2223; const int l = 2238; const int m = 2257; const int n = 2326;
